In fact, Democrats have already officially endorsed six of these candidates by adding them to the national “Red to Blue” program.** [_**With primary elections just weeks away for several of these candidates, they need our support now more than ever. * * *
The Blue Dogs prove that Democrats can win anywhere — including rural and working-class districts that the establishment often writes off. **Last election, our candidates outperformed the top of the ticket by 4%. Our brand of pragmatic, local leadership works, but we need the resources to stay on the air and on the ground.**

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Nine words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter registration is the key to beating voter suppression.
RUSH $30 or more right now, Team, to register, inform, and turn out new voters nationwide >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=051326_2&amount=30]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team, this won’t take long.
You know that voting rights are under attack by anti-voting politicians in Congress and in state legislatures across the country. And last week, the Supreme Court voted to destroy the Voting Rights Act .
Those are just a few reasons why we’ve had to increase our voter registration work year over year.
The good news: It’s working! We’ve registered countless voters since our founding, and we are working hard to reach more Americans than ever.
But the bad news: Our voter registration fund is critically low , and if we can’t catch up, we’ll have to drastically cut back these critical programs in a simply crucial election year.
Team, just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you step up with $30 or whatever you can today to help register 10 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=051326_2&amount=30]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=051326_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=051326_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=051326_2&amount=50]

Thank you for all your support,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051326_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051326_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: As America turns 250, we must honor them while we can
body:
Why this Memorial Day matters more than ever | | | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e9b6e3a0aac34fc0890af338a19cda8b&_e=rGDwaDRTPyBEw5bB61Z-9HSkJWRKzdBBH4txldtSWDf4u9w0W98rRkIfwOOxCJHs2GxUGqm4RESz6aV3c1qrBUJuEg9CEgUWtliKJdiMkjy3GulvMBUuZc0-nRjEPY8IYjIqLVasKra33dpLEiLM361BO3r-Wi1MP3c9lcjt6js4luiG7TsPTXZUXmc0HUPAOHLHBqiSj8UP2wzrXUoRT3hYIT8GOn-7GhPZeDNhcEy-v6RuJghBSiaWoRwJwi-qjOEoKYsajHwdQGf9dRtmfVDPq6nnShezzZ7WLWtPfk0RCO_0h57L632xx9PDd4oW3r5FTdVFson8looKJCEjV8fSVq02p3CHlamSqlh_T0rD4PULWon6ZRyipQw2C5-RqjNVZUcCDCZOslIWfCGDMGLaJBToUiDSYEcVPoF2TmDZnSsKKSG0PKPFZXz8ysw0yVOG9MqfPSdih2kcfWEDUq8UN8MamQ29Rj8m40Xv_Lm4YPjaUZUOc3iDamejiZvdXDv_VTnY_TNij3XFxo-OiC1r8fn227fNo-9rai2AkFA9miYEZmYkxApVCcV6TPTld1C0akFU4Bkt9uVyx-bH0I1g8jor2Bvu1UOMkJ0QucuoKqkqt3cb6gX6stj5nEBKzsEGDhWUquGXLGAffatkgTRMWkkjp9xK7-jAoLJYhCycuW_jRDPwXKXKMas0LjjG)
---
Friend,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e9b6e3a0aac34fc0890af338a19cda8b&_e=rGDwaDRTPyBEw5bB61Z-9HSkJWRKzdBBH4txldtSWDf4u9w0W98rRkIfwOOxCJHs2GxUGqm4RESz6aV3c1qrBUJuEg9CEgUWtliKJdiMkjy3GulvMBUuZc0-nRjEPY8IYjIqLVasKra33dpLEiLM361BO3r-Wi1MP3c9lcjt6js4luiG7TsPTXZUXmc0HUPAOHLHBqiSj8UP2wzrXUoRT3hYIT8GOn-7GhPZeDNhcEy-v6RuJghBSiaWoRwJwi-qzKqH2NO41xmrLxfDGS2Yo3wD_utYmYBVu2Pno3iCrQwDbrRRbYpAvVpKnPsHNRTUVB5Vk0NiDAviS8o84nLeq6aNdksz9OBNqF5BH9G2hSJzAt5vZxKsKjgTwVh8xIp4gJEkgd2WFbwiv7RIWuQyH2pps42Z9DkR73Ll_v7hYaC-8VjAkNeYfqHPMKJMQiOx66kOaFYdPushIfIGJuSMffwsmvf4Ry1vqyRF3spMOP6K0VjzxB1TmumM3NN3Qti-AA4s1fa6s_y37pTX6ewcg28vMfsCv_6jEbXlI-UEvi6PpCQzkNSBOUJ9Hu_NRC-In3Ks9q7tL9VONzGjldlg79wPOpaORmruRVpTxHrnBVDig95nKjU93lG81LLq8VUYOW8ff_BQyJ7mXACbk1pICpnZ1I7HROFBoWYaT9-AokSxQoqVSvs1FRQxdkQ_ZZMG)
---
Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America’s 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e9b6e3a0aac34fc0890af338a19cda8b&_e=rGDwaDRTPyBEw5bB61Z-9HSkJWRKzdBBH4txldtSWDf4u9w0W98rRkIfwOOxCJHs2GxUGqm4RESz6aV3c1qrBUJuEg9CEgUWtliKJdiMkjy3GulvMBUuZc0-nRjEPY8IYjIqLVasKra33dpLEiLM361BO3r-Wi1MP3c9lcjt6js4luiG7TsPTXZUXmc0HUPAOHLHBqiSj8UP2wzrXUoRT3hYIT8GOn-7GhPZeDNhcEy-v6RuJghBSiaWoRwJwi-qihQtfhcUUdpkFtr0toZCuPr5mJ2o-cPPKI8zfhub6YNO98p9VTwWGGHZN9GaF5iBkQYl460crltOLl6jfz2J0qXq2J7U2cZ3Lc7FPMgWvX7mthHn-i8YoiMGahOBt5VurN6VIkEmarUfuIDFa_QVfe_eSa7Czvofsc_kr6g46CvlIzFQz6ZvAh2UXK1-imxzBqQn6LxSsmSTiikyHcGwK3_sS1ZIcvltDnl7QRzcfB0POfZYg6O8-kDK00YqAf6B3h_3EBlfy4t9qlivoeEWKOtEzoK6rCZiyCP8aNob9Nwrz4W3IJ416ZaUnZ8vPWbhMpl01i84GIP5pCjBsje16QE2r_lOMgdNnRHgF-Ax7gDu0uBUMIMCMoQd7x27W-bb2bOz6HxmqJHxcB9nEjaVmxCLtfnqkhEi2R-IQD6OOrFmL4j1I8C9W1fWn8X0Pp6k)**

On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. **Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. ** [**And please, if you’re able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day parade right now during America’s 250****th****birthday.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e9b6e3a0aac34fc0890af338a19cda8b&_e=rGDwaDRTPyBEw5bB61Z-9HSkJWRKzdBBH4txldtSWDf4u9w0W98rRkIfwOOxCJHs2GxUGqm4RESz6aV3c1qrBUJuEg9CEgUWtliKJdiMkjy3GulvMBUuZc0-nRjEPY8IYjIqLVasKra33dpLEiLM361BO3r-Wi1MP3c9lcjt6js4luiG7TsPTXZUXmc0HUPAOHLHBqiSj8UP2wzrXUoRT3hYIT8GOn-7GhPZeDNhcEy-v6RuJghBSiaWoRwJwi-qSz8Vx0m01PUV4zjcidxGOhIBblGZocJaVa42h6_OqSZ5eu90JHsTHRACcrEZZ_M6ephClJNquBm-Q51Of8z_60tbXu8TIoFwwmvW3iUidQFOduBJpqSl0CMUf0kbxCyK3qXqE7FxDvbfVH4wWnmCX7QtS-sKTeIf9T-J6PaBVRNmKfLxniUWtk4qOa7wo7kEE9Lk6meGC6IaFR5lLiANoLXI4vsBz4Fk7zqdLZgtVnW1gVsX3VCMxa7FYPZ7wThzyqeI3IP9gy4fVC2FHWBVTN7bdF7KgQ8O2lRpXbmcm7ssriHp-zerUlp7lS9rVbKP0lPpJzrOMyOdIQsFv2wW2FFbkqcDHc86t2LuFm4bpMcZNT3t4qwYEaaX3nDAzXg_FNhza5y-isPWWkLwccNqY0tOyLUh6CFUFZ_0F5OoI0U97BwD1EMF60m6lHCgZi0WPpT_MPpf2OFU9CPLfJNifQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Why this Memorial Day matters more than ever | | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Friend, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. | | | - | | | | | This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center | | | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

clean_body: Peter, I was going through our audit records this morning, and I saw that your status in the is still marked as With the midterm elections coming up in November, I need to make sure we have accurate, verified information for every committed conservative who's going to stand with us in this fight. ****************************************************************************************************** Every day in the Senate, I'm fighting battles that directly affect your family, your community, and your future. From securing our border to standing up to reckless spending, I'm working to deliver real results for hardworking Americans. But I can't do any of it without knowing that patriots like you are with me. This audit ensures that when November comes, we're ready to fight together and win together. **************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Senator Katie Britt ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. | | Team, The freedom to vote as we know it has been challenged by the Supreme Court – led by Chief Justice John Roberts. We must stand up right now as extremist lawmakers are ramming through maps that gut the voices of Black and brown voters across the South. With so many attacks happening at the same time, they want us to be too demoralized to fight back. **They want us to believe we don’t have power. But we know that we DO still have power — and we’ve got a big opportunity coming up to use it.** [**I’m asking you to join us and a massive coalition for the National Day of Action for Voting Rights this Saturday, May 16, 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131352162/620810236/437348399?refcode=emm_ffa_20260513_T1_DayofActionMobz_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTA1ODc4Zi0yYjRmLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3nUMp32XwMwAX0bvZIFEmX4ZHtp070e2TVP2Lq7w1g0=&emci=d605878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ea05878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277) **Organizers will gather in Selma and Montgomery, Alabama — and take action in solidarity across the country — to continue the unfinished business of fighting for freedom.** Believe me:**[if you _can_ be there in person in Montgomery, Alabama, you will want to be there in person.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131352164/620810244/437348399?refcode=emm_ffa_20260513_T1_DayofActionMobz_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTA1ODc4Zi0yYjRmLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3nUMp32XwMwAX0bvZIFEmX4ZHtp070e2TVP2Lq7w1g0=&emci=d605878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ea05878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277) **See history in the making as a people-powered movement once again fights for the freedom to vote. That type of organizing is the only reason we have a Voting Rights Act to begin with. Free bus rides are available from sites around Alabama. Organizations and faith leaders can register as partners to help build this movement from the grassroots level. [**You can ALSO spread the word and sign up to take action in your own community**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131352165/620810250/437348399?refcode=emm_ffa_20260513_T1_DayofActionMobz_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTA1ODc4Zi0yYjRmLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3nUMp32XwMwAX0bvZIFEmX4ZHtp070e2TVP2Lq7w1g0=&emci=d605878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ea05878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277) **— we need Americans all over the country standing in solidarity with the South as our lawmakers try to dismantle Black and brown political power.** | [SIGN UP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131352166/620810255/437348399?refcode=emm_ffa_20260513_T1_DayofActionMobz_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTA1ODc4Zi0yYjRmLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3nUMp32XwMwAX0bvZIFEmX4ZHtp070e2TVP2Lq7w1g0=&emci=d605878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ea05878f-2b4f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277)

This will be a long fight for a multiracial democracy that truly responds to the needs of the people. The Roberts Court’s attack on Americans’ right to fair representation will not go unchallenged.
There will be lots of steps to take along the way.
But if we keep marching side by side, this is a fight we can win.
Thank you,
Lauren Groh-Wargo
CEO, Fair Fight Action

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Should I assume we won’t hear back from you?
body:
Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you've always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump's mission to save America, so I'm giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/_RsAEeE0UI8OJsVC2k6s3iqhpYV16oVUXwRDeLamZd5HwL263_AdGbAlHEohDnOgbzL61HSlEPNlyFSS1lLzJd8mwByzGGpVEW6AheKFeqIw7NKzxHC43l-ZOD3PlbGbJPjsWaPJ7aVCeeRrKGd1GNT6pN-7KGtD4Qbc_vYKz62wlSivTtUw0AQF_wrqEzyn7GcY2F8sZAX4lpvpeHnRlfcGbE8UjIcxsQYD75HAPM7a9kieGAJVpP7d8aMMXMIItP-eqFJV1z79654OFf0583kSk4MWfP43488ookXV1iO61IEKfcxVDHH2NohidLsRmRutv2fXh1IgXAtHbY0PiNrqJS_cqzTWWqMbDC_NRTsuMLrCc2x1AUDMk8EZVt1U0URyiTHVo3T-wS6MrR6F4Akdk2wDR4HoTMWY2IlYOtNr0XEW26ZOqmj8qVlhtsOG45W2y6CZWElQRFUGXzihMamM2bj7OMjLnoS4j1Xier_GU3o4MeePeDUdQVMhZyIo4SLusIG5BIX-iS_o1JR3jc4yrQy7-vaFB9Is8QPIr510gF8oabfn_01Q_ABfOUGSHw3jybUFmbetFd94Oot-BmViXEOQPPWsue4VLoQMvI5fu1tA3UFE2O59q_5TV3e5I1y1T2R9NbWFID47rKs42CH_q88SkOKnnrFf9qPgul1bpeEzfHikPDy9b9gR20-1lrYACl5LFftXm7dUdZmq94E8JboN55nehqyR6Q3LFnb3mH_KS8Bx-qxTEXEtTCbkAWhYigsfnBofi08Jn9rlZ95gBK1wovOLWjofsnaVZv8bviIKteals_2Jpwsz46p9zJSCjD2kGnlOKp3TJ2dNV3TlP7rpeDY/XNTdltYWMlVEVALsaMLUzr6HaVoDOOHu/20) Really, that's it! I'm also really starting to worry that we haven't heard from you! | | Friend, Did you see the recent _Colorado Politics_ article? Here’s the headline:
---
“Colorado congressional elections see over **$9M in ad reserves from House Democrats’ super PAC”**
---
This means that **our race has been singled out as one of the Democrats’****TOP TARGETS****anywhere in the country.** National Democrats and outside special interests are preparing to pour more than **$9 million** to try and silence common-sense leadership fighting for Colorado. And I’ll be honest with you, Friend: We don’t have the money in our campaign account to match that kind of spending on our own. _**[That’s why we must build a strong war chest NOW. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, Did you see the recent Colorado Politics article? Here’s the headline: “Colorado congressional elections see over $9M in ad reserves from House Democrats’ super PAC” This means that our race has been singled out as one of the Democrats’TOP TARGETSanywhere in the country. National Democrats and outside special interests are preparing to pour more than $9 million to try and silence common-sense leadership fighting for Colorado. And I’ll be honest with you, Friend: We don’t have the money in our campaign account to match that kind of spending on our own. | | | | Right now, I am calling on all of my friends and supporters. The only way we win this fight is together— CO-03 should be decided by the people of Western Colorado—not by Washington Democrats and out-of-state donors trying to buy this seat. But whether we like it or not, the attacks are coming. Thank you,Jeff | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress Copyright © 2026 Jeff Hurd For Congress Our mailing address is: Jeff Hurd For Congress 2695 Patterson Rd, Suite 2-287 Grand Junction, CO 81506 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . You can also reach us at mailto:info@jeffhurdforcolorado.com.

name: Harry Dunn
subject: this was a hard email to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| My pain and my trauma didn't end on January 7.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10889?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.13_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON_RS-T0&t=4&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y) Hey Peter, I'll be straight with you: I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally. I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, and those were tough some days. But the aftermath of the January 6th insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain and my trauma didn't end on January 7. Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest obstacles I've ever faced. But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6th committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy. And Peter, I've never looked back. [**I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you split a donation of just $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me hit my $250,000 mid-month goal?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10889?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.13_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON_RS-T0&t=5&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Harry Dunn and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10890?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.13_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON_RS-T0&t=6&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y)
---
[DONATE $25 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10891?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.13_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON_RS-T0&t=7&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y)
---
[DONATE $50 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10892?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.13_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON_RS-T0&t=8&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y)
---
[DONATE MORE >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10893?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.13_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON_RS-T0&t=9&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y)
---
With your support, I can fight for Democrats and every Marylander in District 5.
Harry Dunn
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&t=10&refcode2=2247_259176_01kf6y&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y)
---
We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. Every contribution – $10, $25, or even $100 – allows us to keep amplifying real leaders who will fight for our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=10&t=11&refcode2=2247_259176_01kf6y&akid=2247%2E259176%2E01kf6y)**

The American people are **FED UP** with Trump’s tyranny!

And after **8+ million people** attended the most recent No Kings Protest – _that would make it the**largest protest in American history!**_

**IF we keep this momentum FLYING with even BIGGER turnout at the next No Kings protest, we can DERAIL Trump’s agenda ONCE AND FOR ALL!**

**_BUT IF we step off the gas and stay silent, our progress to crush this regime will vanish in an instant!_**

[We’re calling on 2,000 people _from every state_ to pledge to attend so we can do our part to say “NO KINGS IN AMERICA!” Commit to attending the next No Kings protest by clicking here or the button below »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge?refcode=VPP_20260513_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=8&akid=24370%2E878179%2EF5AQIS)

Say NO to kings! Say NO to tyrants! And say YES to democracy!
— The Voter Protection Project

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=24370%2E878179%2EF5AQIS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=24370%2E878179%2EF5AQIS).**

Emergency application just filed by VA. Show your support!
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Supreme Court to Restore Voting Map Drawn by Democrats](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taeb37373-a815-4202-b87e-d77182a01c9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

See link below)_ **[Breaking](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92c85b5a-0663-4ce6-a29f-02f2a9cc3d55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) right now. VA just filed an emergency appeal in its redistricting battle:**

"[Virginia] State officials asked the justices to overturn a Virginia Supreme Court decision that struck down a congressional map" that was critically important to Democratic party efforts to take back the House].

The VA Supreme Court was wrong to decide the way it did, and that BS decision needs to be reversed ASAP, since we are just days (hours?) away from it being too late. Republican states have been making all kinds of changes willy-nilly to help GOP candidates, and blocking a blue state from doing it -- even thought their voters expliticly voted for it -- is crap.

[**Tell the Supreme Court to reverse the decision, side with the Virginia voters who voted for it, and FFS, do the right thing for democracy and America!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99cf0fce-fb59-4505-a9af-4e987044447b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch: Justice Department Confirms Ongoing Criminal Investigation of Africa Aid Agency as Whistleblower Faces Retaliation Lawsuit
body:
Judicial Watch announced that the U.S. Department of Justice
confirmed in a federal court hearing that its investigation of senior
officials at the U.S. African Development Foundation (USADF) remains
ongoing as one of Judicial Watch’s whistleblower clients faces a
retaliatory lawsuit brought by the agency’s former president.

[alt_text]

[*****]
May 13, 2026

name: Katie Porter
subject: From Eureka to San Diego
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I know how meaningful it is when someone chips in $5 or $10 to a political campaign they believe in.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41335%2E3422442%2EK_zKm1)
Peter,
I’m a single mom who shops on a budget and clips coupons — so when I’m asked to sign off on big campaign expenses, I want to make sure we’re getting the best bang for our buck.
That’s why each time we’ve bought TV ads, rented an event venue, or expanded our team, I’ve made sure we’re using our resources as efficiently and effectively as possible.
**[If you want to help fund these efforts, chip in to our campaign today >>](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260513_3_ak.hzuKLJ&refcode=em20260513-41335&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41335%2E3422442%2EK_zKm1)**
I understand the struggles so many Californians are facing — and I know how meaningful it is when someone chips in $5 or $10 to a political campaign they believe in.
**I’ll never take your support for granted, which is why I’m laser-focused on getting the most value out of every dollar you donate.**
With the final days of this election almost here, we can’t afford to slow down. I’ll make sure we’re spending our resources the best way possible — but I still need your support to reach the voters we need.
**[Peter, can you chip in $5 or more to our campaign today so we can keep reaching Californians from Eureka to San Diego and everywhere in between?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260513_3_ak.hzuKLJ&refcode=em20260513-41335&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41335%2E3422442%2EK_zKm1)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260513-41335&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=41335_3422442_K_zKm1&akid=41335%2E3422442%2EK_zKm1)**

# ['Can America First and a United Nations Coexist?' by Steve Abramowicz](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=197221106&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MjIxMTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg3Mzc5ODcsImV4cCI6MTc4MTMyOTk4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1p4Yi20FfkFHaw_soADvJH4s0hho0_nyVVSPGMoZagU)
### Can you put "America First" and the United Nations in the same sentence without a fight breaking out?
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| May 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=197221106&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MjIxMTA2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3ODczNzk4NywiZXhwIjoxNzgxMzI5OTg3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.e8PZ5S_pEoQqSUHfu1PkB9lY9vmE0JBrh4b-coGArOA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=197221106&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MjIxMTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg3Mzc5ODcsImV4cCI6MTc4MTMyOTk4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1p4Yi20FfkFHaw_soADvJH4s0hho0_nyVVSPGMoZagU)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/56ebbe55-4f4d-4aeb-97c4-b1c0289b95cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Mike Waltz recently announced plans for an initial payment toward the billions of dollars in arrears the United States owes to the UN, while simultaneously articulating an "America First" approach to multilateral engagement. This development comes amid warnings from UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres about the organization's potential "imminent financial collapse."

According to reports from February 2026, the United States accounts for over 95% of the UN's regular budget arrears, owing approximately $2.19 billion by early February. Additionally, the US owes another $2.4 billion for peacekeeping operations and $43.6 million for UN tribunals, bringing the total debt to over $4.6 billion.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=197221106&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MjIxMTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg3Mzc5ODcsImV4cCI6MTc4MTMyOTk4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1p4Yi20FfkFHaw_soADvJH4s0hho0_nyVVSPGMoZagU)
Waltz announced that "you'll certainly see an initial tranche of money very shortly," describing it as "a significant down payment on our annual dues." While the exact amount remains undetermined, Waltz indicated the payment would occur "in a matter of weeks." This announcement follows President Trump's signing of a congressional spending bill that includes $3.1 billion for US dues to the UN and other international organizations.

In his Fox News interview, Waltz rejected claims that unpaid US dues were primarily responsible for the UN's financial crisis. Instead, he emphasized the need for institutional reform. "Under President Trump, we're demanding reform at the United Nations," Waltz stated, suggesting that funding should be tied to accountability and efficiency.

Waltz's approach aligns with what he calls "burden sharing"--a key component of the administration's America First philosophy. He argues that while the US should fulfill its financial obligations, the UN must focus on core peace and security missions rather than expanding into areas where member states should take primary responsibility.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.-kejzex3tOO7nFgKcjpTafZhACyNvuyKMQylujZ5Aag?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=197221106)
Notably, Waltz has been critical of what he views as mission creep and bureaucratic redundancy within the UN system. He has advocated for consolidating overlapping functions, particularly noting that seven separate UN agencies currently have climate change as their primary mission. "The UN bureaucracy has grown too large, and needs to be much more efficient and effective," he told reporters.

The planned payments appear to represent a tactical approach--fulfilling financial commitments while using them as leverage to advance reform objectives. Waltz emphasized that this strategy reflects "tough love" toward the organization, designed to make it "fit for purpose and focused, and stop trying to do everything for everyone."

As the United States moves forward with these payments, all eyes will be on whether this strategy of engagement combined with pressure for reform will yield meaningful changes at the United Nations or further strain US relations with other member states who may view conditions on funding as undermining multilateral principles.

Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9312e8e1-a1cc-497c-b01e-b70a31ae71ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

clean_body: Can you put "America First" and the United Nations in the same sentence without a fight breaking out? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Can you put "America First" and the United Nations in the same sentence without a fight breaking out? | | | May 14 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Mike Waltz recently announced plans for an initial payment toward the billions of dollars in arrears the United States owes to the UN, while simultaneously articulating an "America First" approach to multilateral engagement. This development comes amid warnings from UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres about the organization's potential "imminent financial collapse." According to reports from February 2026, the United States accounts for over 95% of the UN's regular budget arrears, owing approximately $2.19 billion by early February. Additionally, the US owes another $2.4 billion for peacekeeping operations and $43.6 million for UN tribunals, bringing the total debt to over $4.6 billion. Waltz announced that "you'll certainly see an initial tranche of money very shortly," describing it as "a significant down payment on our annual dues." While the exact amount remains undetermined, Waltz indicated the payment would occur "in a matter of weeks." This announcement follows President Trump's signing of a congressional spending bill that includes $3.1 billion for US dues to the UN and other international organizations. In his Fox News interview, Waltz rejected claims that unpaid US dues were primarily responsible for the UN's financial crisis. Instead, he emphasized the need for institutional reform. "Under President Trump, we're demanding reform at the United Nations," Waltz stated, suggesting that funding should be tied to accountability and efficiency. Waltz's approach aligns with what he calls "burden sharing"--a key component of the administration's America First philosophy. He argues that while the US should fulfill its financial obligations, the UN must focus on core peace and security missions rather than expanding into areas where member states should take primary responsibility. Notably, Waltz has been critical of what he views as mission creep and bureaucratic redundancy within the UN system. He has advocated for consolidating overlapping functions, particularly noting that seven separate UN agencies currently have climate change as their primary mission. "The UN bureaucracy has grown too large, and needs to be much more efficient and effective," he told reporters. The planned payments appear to represent a tactical approach--fulfilling financial commitments while using them as leverage to advance reform objectives. Waltz emphasized that this strategy reflects "tough love" toward the organization, designed to make it "fit for purpose and focused, and stop trying to do everything for everyone." As the United States moves forward with these payments, all eyes will be on whether this strategy of engagement combined with pressure for reform will yield meaningful changes at the United Nations or further strain US relations with other member states who may view conditions on funding as undermining multilateral principles. Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer | | ---|---|--- Thanks for reading! This post is public, so feel free to share it. This Substack is reader-supported. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Heartland Journal 99 E. Main Street, Franklin, TN 37064 ? ?

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: I need you to believe me
body:
Let me explain...

Believe me, Friend. Believe me when I tell you that I did everything I could to avoid sending this email.

I hate to be so negative, **[but I'm afraid this could be the end of the road for my campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ht0tc2lbqrn5tmu25q47pmg4tphsgjdlg3eh0g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0stimcpr1chh2bs)**

National Democrats are touting the strongest ticket 'in a generation' and raising insurmountable amounts of campaign funds.

_**[And meanwhile, I'm about to miss my next major campaign milestone and fundraising goal.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr1qp9e9gs7ckh8bjpusuehtleqo67i3vafr9ig8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0stimcpr1chh2bs)**_

This is Ashley Hinson. I'm a wife, a proud mom of two, and an America First patriot running for U.S. Senate in Iowa. President Trump endorsed my campaign within days of my announcement, and I'm honored to have his support.

But here's the problem: National Democrats aren't about to give up Iowa without a fight. They're raising the funds, organizing their base, and preparing early so they can flip Iowa blue in no time.

You and I both know we can't let that happen, so here's the deal...

**[I need your support fast. I won't put a number on it because I mean it when I say anything you give can and will make a difference in my election.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0q8nq70ogqki7lk84bi7kmj332prkapnb7kfug_rp22sh2s8i6epr0stimcpr1chh2bs)**

**[But what I will put a number on is an exclusive, limited-time matching offer for YOU ONLY! Top allies of President Trump have authorized a 300% match on every gift to my campaign for the next 60 minutes.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znr5gt4ti0fb3nrpi7fv4g5vq3mp54uld6f2uhlo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0stimcpr1chh2bs)**

**[ACCEPT YOUR 300% MATCH](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmc200f64asfsg2la0nv806cgcvse8dpqegt7n9g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0stimcpr1chh2bs)**

That means your gift (no matter how big or small!) will go 3 TIMES as far to securing victory for Republicans in Iowa.

We're in the middle of an uphill battle, so this is a huge opportunity for us to pull ahead. _Don 't let it go to waste, Friend._

My husband and I are raising our boys to be honest men of their word, so I can assure you I'll keep my promise to advance President Trump's winning agenda and your conservative values in the Senate.

I just need your help to make sure I get there.

Thank you. God bless you.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlb35otrhvv9mcq6usfuep3ur0h5ad675jdiqjg0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0stimcpr1chh2bs)
Ashley Hinson

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump in China, Avoiding the Neighbors, and Best Pancakes
body:
President Trump arrived in Beijing on Wednesday for his first visit to China as president since 2017, kicking off [high-stakes talks with Chinese President](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtSAQhZ8GOw0gChYUf2N3_3ZLgzLoGASDrO59-w33FbaaL5nknHzn6zW9DHoM639zgM4uTgGey0POkKacvo8Tw7JhMOaOaDGseYMAE6e8r2lXMzFZg_49icpqB8ChrUAzKZXsWt521aZBWAXABjYPjik1ULYsVrlZdN3QSyUq1CWNdkwwSiUTjTK9HMysQLlZLY4TQcFijqnZI4a8gfPveENqlnhUXm85nxdp_xE-Ej4-z9Ms81Usyp_wsSDh40emngF3DGv9g_WO4Sx4AORyTUp4G0_4WCVtzwe9x6uXRND1MOg_bflPE92a_wYAAP__n0t8hg) Xi Jinping on trade, AI, rare earths, fentanyl, Taiwan, and the Iran war.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO4yAQhp8Gd4mAwUAKFydZ6fbaKxGBcTwnAxYQr_btT97LG2z3SfNpNPP_fz7ch6eN8vO3Tzj1pbiMn23D3rG6Xl9ppxxWyt4fhSLlZ18xo5Nc6gsfL0K56Gn7cmqI04IoEQachDHWjCBhHNYJtDV2UdyHCFHrcLMPjDcB4maCMD4ONJ3b-CiU4NwIdbVem5t_WLTLw4ZFMsUxUi_1-rdQ7isu21c5sF5DScM2rb3vjcEvJu9M3ikf2PqVUsLaMJ7OOYB7YTArLZjUYWcwa1CSSe0ZzDB-Y6DIYJbCWiZ1YjALftIpL0zqV0-ulVcNyGCu6MN6ed_hkqfs2l5yK_VtBp92T8_MYN597RlrW2kXll9gBPc_uVem7oc6xf2Tto2aNkzxZ_K0fX_Wf1THMcl_AQAA__9bcZqO) | |
# Thursday, May 14, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1607, about 100 English colonists arrived on the James River in Virginia to establish [Jamestown](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEuumzAYhVcDM5CxeZiBB7dNqVTdJJVaiSoTZOPf8EfGpsZNwu6rdJAu4M6OdB46-vrjcJRo0U0nuYCIxg8O7puFGCEMMfxZVnTjjE7Km0eNboozOBgooXVGqqwoBy3R7kOZamEAKLAURNE0vKkYZVU6C6Ja3kqu1agK1VaGkka3tKg0qaVWiqconmukKsqCkKYocy7rppWKAzeKj4YmJQGN0Yf86tHFGYzd_Q1CPvoltWKOcd0S9pbQLqHdjFv0AcerXGCL_u4g92F6Gft_lXmTvVLPMuu2sNmIOmGHN7N8Ovuwfqa_xx_0Z40H9utxuHzPLqdln_qvw_ulK6-anXUfV_t4n75U3zLa8zQIvd7RWtzqJinJtEi0_47GD9G9Cfo3AAD__8ShkI4), the first permanent English settlement in North America. They traveled from England on the ships _Susan Constant_ , _Godspeed_ , and _Discovery_. Won't you be my neighbor? For a growing number of Americans, the answer is "[no, thanks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL9G6ihQFGXJhYo07i5tSmFNLskN6F2B5Em5fH1w_oW0g8HMw_v1sX8AZeL4E164tSA741UztoZlb-XzdRC7RAxwCnni2BIy7kabm9KzGu3ugfLXbnu_BUSDU4_buCzrMk9mmvu03d093O4zjN4vBtbZag2L82OYVrR2Dj1t32t6Hu2o9TLaYYXbcofnimt4ri6Yzmr01KQMv4W4JQz5S04sg5NXn7fU2lG76UdnHp15XNc1ANIgJXbmUbAiFJfUUcR_ulbf2SGldeZRWwGOWKpi_NOUFymqJVQeXSZGJUExUkxPKUnEqyqOINNf4qiA_bvrMtSqPJ3kURGrJ2bhSPx93pfNHxflTPW2dFbHF1B-Q7f_Mn1u5l8AAAD__4m_l1M)." A new study finds neighborly chatter has dropped sharply over the past decade, especially among young adults. Read more below, and tell us how often you talk to the folks next door in today's poll. Scientists say one small part of the brain holds the key to memory, navigation, and long-term cognitive health, yet many Americans unknowingly let it weaken. The good news? A few surprisingly enjoyable activities may help protect your brain before real decline begins. Tune in to _The Flyover Podcast_ as Ayla Brown shares three simple habits researchers say could help keep your brain sharper for years to come. [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUgOHT2FsseIAhA0OXbOnaET2bR_wqDBahSXP7qr1CD_D_0vdxDVfkzOX2jjv5nmoo9Lxn6p1a6O1rP7isGxfER-XI5dY3KhRAwHwS5iR1iMj5FfQYfSICUiN5aa2zRoEy4-aVwTUtQsdkZ1yEcAbs2UmFcAYknEf2vzdhpJZCWKknh7M94-LIpcWtCQYtKHKvbfqsXPpGKb_qg9q01n3Mfuv9uA_qbYDLAJdGS8MSp_wa4HLUSN-9oRybj8eTc-b7bActbjty_uv7v9APDz8BAAD__43Ra5A). Today's sponsor, [Immersed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO4yAQhp8Gd4mAwUAKFydZ6fbaKxGBcTwnAxYQr_btT97LG2z3SfNpNPP_fz7ch6eN8vO3Tzj1pbiMn23D3rG6Xl9ppxxWyt4fhSLlZ18xo5Nc6gsfL0K56Gn7cmqI04IoEQachDHWjCBhHNYJtDV2UdyHCFHrcLMPjDcB4maCMD4ONJ3b-CiU4NwIdbVem5t_WLTLw4ZFMsUxUi_1-rdQ7isu21c5sF5DScM2rb3vjcEvJu9M3ikf2PqVUsLaMJ7OOYB7YTArLZjUYWcwa1CSSe0ZzDB-Y6DIYJbCWiZ1YjALftIpL0zqV0-ulVcNyGCu6MN6ed_hkqfs2l5yK_VtBp92T8_MYN597RlrW2kXll9gBPc_uVem7oc6xf2Tto2aNkzxZ_K0fX_Wf1THMcl_AQAA__9bcZqO), is giving investors a final chance to buy pre-IPO shares at $0.72 before the company behind a leading VR productivity platform and the upcoming Visor headset heads toward a planned NASDAQ debut under ticker $IMRS.
|
---
## Trump Lands in China for Xi Summit
President Trump arrived in Beijing on Wednesday for his first visit to China as president since 2017, kicking off [high-stakes talks with Chinese President](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtSAQhZ8GOw0gChYUf2N3_3ZLgzLoGASDrO59-w33FbaaL5nknHzn6zW9DHoM639zgM4uTgGey0POkKacvo8Tw7JhMOaOaDGseYMAE6e8r2lXMzFZg_49icpqB8ChrUAzKZXsWt521aZBWAXABjYPjik1ULYsVrlZdN3QSyUq1CWNdkwwSiUTjTK9HMysQLlZLY4TQcFijqnZI4a8gfPveENqlnhUXm85nxdp_xE-Ej4-z9Ms81Usyp_wsSDh40emngF3DGv9g_WO4Sx4AORyTUp4G0_4WCVtzwe9x6uXRND1MOg_bflPE92a_wYAAP__n0t8hg) Xi Jinping on trade, AI, rare earths, fentanyl, Taiwan, and the Iran war. He brought a billionaire entourage. Elon Musk, Nvidia's Jensen Huang, and Apple's Tim Cook are among [the CEOs accompanying Trump](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAUhJ_GdCBzbLBTuLgNXW67JfLPMZzI2BF4w-btV-QVtppipG_0zdd9vltKlJf_dkNTY5kznkfCWnGf6_69PSn7lbK1r0KB8lJXzDgDh7HlQ9vLOVhK71k2wUREQNGg6ZXSahAghmY1VkQ3hpu9aetEP2rplHdBcRhROxVjQ-ai8aGXPeeql522o7pZp1FHp30EJjkGqmXvHoVyXTGmd3nh3vmyNcmstT4PJv4xmBhM53l2Pjt_lQymC81g4gODqRcMpo9T-1Fqf6h1SA_KS7sh1is9lqNb65aa3YTnSSnRMSom-bJZSp_F-qebXgZ-AwAA__-t_Hv3), part of a push to win Chinese orders of American planes, soybeans, and beef. Xi skipped the tarmac welcome, but [protocol experts called it an upgrade](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAQhp8GOzaAqGxBcQ3dXnulGXXQ2SB4yLrZt7_oK1w7k3z5v-_n0T-AAsX5G1a0xac-4nsPWArmvuTXulEcF4oAR6KJ4lwWjNgroVouGi51PwGFT6-ryXpEhXWFVnad6Zpa1U21WDF6o2s0d41gZIMTyFaC9jAqM8iurcieNNFILYXopL4ZaLs7DAaNH8zoFdMCJyop356JYlnQh086MN_GtFbBLqVsO6u_mHJMufjZ0l7OF1PuBDPlRMOUkzVT7rXz048pd0nxFSbkwH9fVJBnPBDOFnxcEo3Ifcqcys6B8pZy4XNGLJiv-9WGU-QD0pPizJSrsp22N4VAe9sxLeYVKFwjy7_KHlb9BQAA___Qw44Y) from 2017. Vice President Han Zheng greeted Trump alongside a military band, an honor guard, and 300 flag-waving Chinese youths.
## AI Backlash Hits Both Parties
Voter anxiety over artificial intelligence is hitting both sides of the aisle, with a [new Gallup poll](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb7bg-gdnYOjiLV07WjfmYt8KAwKSNG9fpa_Q-ZO-c3S-rusV2XPYP_EkU11cAz2Lp1oprzXfz8RhOzggPiJbDns9KNAKEqZWjq0aVovsX-vQWOOIgPqGjNJ61mMP_dgcxl1uJFErJD1S7xxYmkjZyaKaR7JTw-b9Jkc1KCm1GroZJ33B20yzu82bAzFIslxj7r4jh3qQ86_4oNxt8Wy8OWpNRfQfAhYBy1u_29H7e3rvApYUvRewaHnRGgQseFLmDUNpY0qxUGuxYrtRqJRLi5mww5J-mmxserL3XCYtBrmfyP4PWf_V6WHgNwAA__9fgn4j) finding 71% of Americans oppose AI data centers in their local area. A separate [Annenberg survey](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DsOnDAQgOHTQGcExuZRuEiz3aZNicZmDBP5gexh0d4-Sq6QC_z69f16b2-gQOn4CREN-7wlfGpAZiwblztelNxJCeCTaad08IkJN9nLSfRaDGrbgcJ3U-1uPKLEsUUzzPMy61GOuj2NxF5P8zSval21Ra-81cMw6tVbrYZdtWT-1no9qKHv50F1C0zzCnbBxdvFedmoHnfiXLrfmRKf6MM3f7B0Lsc2mJP5qs34o5GvRr6e5-kgJUwWy3HdNpC7ciD3dZgYS5fL0cgXRCzkIFVxYa0UqTI5ATbfLICqoHiBYwFpFw8kFjEXFAWPOwBTTo18tcXs10MhUJ3mRvVHBAr_jvi_GD9G_gkAAP__u5OK8g) found 65% of Americans say the government has done too little to regulate AI, including 53% of Republicans, 72% of independents, and 77% of Democrats. In Texas, [GOP lawmakers are caught](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR3ILHZMChd_Q5e_vRIteIE9GYPMEi5vf0pe4ZqpRvNJ8_XoH8iR0_wfV_IybX2i64gkQrmXfK47p3HhhPjcOHCaZaFEPWi4ldqWtekDcnz1pgh-IgJqCvK1c62zDTS2WPxE90DjSNqCC0NwUw3obHM3ZIJtTV2wf69pW5taa1ebqsWbu-PQUjsN7TiBMpoCy5ar742TLDTF1_akXI3bWkS_iOyHav4p6BR013VVQj94SObhTFRteVbQvQkFnbbvcAq6T6fMtJ9D5BHTUQYULEdKQvko85kxKuiK7MN-cYx83Jwyel6R4weWP7319PAbAAD__26mftE) between a pro-data-center governor and outraged constituents in rural districts, where most new sites are being proposed. Some Democrats are also trying to capitalize on the anxiety, while at the federal level, [executive action has stalled](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpSAUhJ9GO4wCKregsLG7t93SIBzk7CLc6FHXt9-4r_BXk8xkJpPv13t6G4yYlo9ZQZPPU4Jrj0AE20TbsX4x2YDJmDOjw7RQgAQTr3nH6pY1cnIG4z3J0mkPwEGUoJu-V30ruGjLoGfhXWs7NYOTUtrOggCQnfJeuVa8-hL1s1a3jWzqum9kpUzXv8ysQPlZWc8LWYNDylv1O2OiAD7e-YStsnktow5E370QQ8HHgo_XdVXrnp6s4CMkduwFH9ec4H7UbH-AHscgg79gD8ITmLGEObGdTIzg2HyzKyABC_nYgWHyuATCtDy9jQ0DF_IjhnLT7nthjLh3fSHrZTUY_5-iH5E8Nf8XAAD__9EBieY) amid White House infighting.
## Survey: Americans Avoid Their Neighbors
Americans have all but stopped chatting with their neighbors, according to [a report](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL9G6ihQFGXJhYo07i5tSmFNLskN6F2B5Em5fH1w_oW0g8HMw_v1sX8AZeL4E164tSA741UztoZlb-XzdRC7RAxwCnni2BIy7kabm9KzGu3ugfLXbnu_BUSDU4_buCzrMk9mmvu03d093O4zjN4vBtbZag2L82OYVrR2Dj1t32t6Hu2o9TLaYYXbcofnimt4ri6Yzmr01KQMv4W4JQz5S04sg5NXn7fU2lG76UdnHp15XNc1ANIgJXbmUbAiFJfUUcR_ulbf2SGldeZRWwGOWKpi_NOUFymqJVQeXSZGJUExUkxPKUnEqyqOINNf4qiA_bvrMtSqPJ3kURGrJ2bhSPx93pfNHxflTPW2dFbHF1B-Q7f_Mn1u5l8AAAD__4m_l1M) from the American Enterprise Institute. In 2012, 59% of Americans talked to a neighbor at least a few times a week. That's [now 41%](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnDAUhZ8GOiNjflNQpJlu06ZEF_uAb2SuR7YXMnn6aOcVtj8636fv98f6QRxYjl90Yil7XAV3DigFaS3p83yyWM9CdEV2LEfxEKxGm1HpQbX96ojDa-1rt-yAQVdjaadpnobOdEPtl6HrBg200Ia2fqa9bzdt92kcJg07jDUvX296aPtW66ntm5nG6QdtM-Z9m-1uql7DcYmp-RNZisceXvFCamw867D4Up656n5W5lGZx33fDZ1IbEnyZ7rwspCC1MR0VOaRkEHJ-so8ckkkB1JWgr9FuRiTKh7KwQYWqLgrAR9-i8nH6FSOlinwP5ZDkbj31gbKWTm-2EGxqA0hysHyharT4p43h8B5nKpeHydxeDuXb4W-FvM_AAD__3vFl6A), with young adults driving the drop. Regular chats among 18-to-29-year-olds fell from 51% to 25%, while seniors dropped only 7 points to 56%. A [separate recent survey](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAUhZ8Gb474s8EDQxdv6drRujEXcysMFqZJ8_ZVKvUJuh3pSOfo-z6uyxUoUd7eYUfXQlkyPs6ErWFdWv3aD8prpAxwL-Qpby1ixkVyOfZ86IVePFB6LrrzLiBKVB06YYw1g5Jq6KIzegVuhFVGWSNUCMJMHsbJwwQahO7Ivdb4ILTg3Ah9sTCaCW4WbbjZNUimOXpqpV4-C-UWMaRnuWO9rGXvkoutHSdTb0zOTM6PLcOrYHKm74PJWU-WyfmVMtIWb6We_R9Mj7DGvrSIlcm5q84fD0qJztEwzbcdKP2etH-ZuTv5EwAA___zrXb4) found one in three Americans now actively avoid their neighbors, citing feuds, awkwardness, or simple disinterest in small talk. Researchers blame the convenience of streaming and on-demand services for turning homes into "entertainment bunkers." [Pew Research Center](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAUheHV4A4LXyDGBcVr3OW1U1rEXMwdYbAwEyu7HyVbmOaUn47-r_tyd5Qob__djraFsmS8zoStYV1a_dkPymuk7NyzkKe8tYgZFxBw40LzQS3eUXotqvM2IALKDu0wjmbUEqTuolXa6CCdCJOWPqBWSg2gpDQKRhimqSP71oQe1CDEOKjeuNs4uYdBEx5mDcCUQE-t1P67UG4RQ3qVJ9Z-LXuXbGztOJn8x2BmMF_X1R94VTzR1TX2pW4M5jOW2nhF508GMwjQDGbxGcNgjuXia8kZ14ae-8LdjpVWl08eEBNvhbeIVHlG2uKj1LfSVeuPi1Ki8zYyJbbdUfp8an8K-bTwGwAA__-Q-IbQ) recently found that just 44% of Americans say they trust most of the people on their block.

clean_body: President Trump arrived in Beijing on Wednesday for his first visit to China as president since 2017, kicking off Xi Jinping on trade, AI, rare earths, fentanyl, Taiwan, and the Iran war. | | | | | | Thursday, May 14, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1607, about 100 English colonists arrived on the James River in Virginia to establish , the first permanent English settlement in North America. They traveled from England on the ships Susan Constant , Godspeed , and Discovery. Won't you be my neighbor? For a growing number of Americans, the answer is "." A new study finds neighborly chatter has dropped sharply over the past decade, especially among young adults. Read more below, and tell us how often you talk to the folks next door in today's poll. Scientists say one small part of the brain holds the key to memory, navigation, and long-term cognitive health, yet many Americans unknowingly let it weaken. The good news? A few surprisingly enjoyable activities may help protect your brain before real decline begins. Tune in to The Flyover Podcast as Ayla Brown shares three simple habits researchers say could help keep your brain sharper for years to come. . Today's sponsor, , is giving investors a final chance to buy pre-IPO shares at $0.72 before the company behind a leading VR productivity platform and the upcoming Visor headset heads toward a planned NASDAQ debut under ticker $IMRS. | Trump Lands in China for Xi Summit President Trump arrived in Beijing on Wednesday for his first visit to China as president since 2017, kicking off Xi Jinping on trade, AI, rare earths, fentanyl, Taiwan, and the Iran war. A separate found 65% of Americans say the government has done too little to regulate AI, including 53% of Republicans, 72% of independents, and 77% of Democrats. In Texas, between a pro-data-center governor and outraged constituents in rural districts, where most new sites are being proposed. Some Democrats are also trying to capitalize on the anxiety, while at the federal level, amid White House infighting. Survey: Americans Avoid Their Neighbors Americans have all but stopped chatting with their neighbors, according to from the American Enterprise Institute. In 2012, 59% of Americans talked to a neighbor at least a few times a week. That's , with young adults driving the drop. Regular chats among 18-to-29-year-olds fell from 51% to 25%, while seniors dropped only 7 points to 56%. A found one in three Americans now actively avoid their neighbors, citing feuds, awkwardness, or simple disinterest in small talk. Researchers blame the convenience of streaming and on-demand services for turning homes into "entertainment bunkers." recently found that just 44% of Americans say they trust most of the people on their block.
